entry.title: Re: Quantities sold per warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Jeroen,

Please give this a try:

 

SELECT
T0.[CreateDate],
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName],
/* Replace the 1, 2, and 3 in r.WhsCode='1' with the actual warehouse codes: */
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='1'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE1,
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='2'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE2,
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='3'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE3

FROM 
OITM T0 

WHERE 
T0.[CreateDate] <= dateadd(year , -1, getdate()))

ORDER BY
1 DESC

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in approval
entry.content:

"error": {
"code": "/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/022",
"message": {
"lang": "en",
"value": "Sales document 2300000109 is in approval. No changes are allowed."
},

Any idea to solve this?

entry.title: Re: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi Jen, Thanks for reply. I tried in mentioned IF_FPM_OVP->CHANGE_UIBB , where in field hidden is not 'X' during the debug flow. Then i deleted the personalization as well. Can i know is there any additional setting i need to check in the system. Thanks for supporting on this.

entry.title: Do you want to explore more about the extensibility mechanisms in SAP Digital Manufacturing?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Customization in SAP Digital Manufacturing learning journey.

Overview
This course aims consultants, solution architects and industry specialists, who want to explore more about the extensibility mechanisms in SAP Digital Manufacturing. The course will especially focus on the Production Operator Dashboard Designer and the Production Process Designer.

Learning objectives

  • Design Production Operator Dashboards (PODs)
  • Understand POD Designer and components
  • Learn about Production Process Designer
  • Create and manage production processes
  • Handle runtime errors and apply log levels
  • Monitor and debug production processes
  • Leverage the Service Registry
  • Publish processes and register APIs
  • Identify triggers and create business rules
  • Create custom POD buttons and notifications

Prerequisites

    • Discovering SAP Digital Manufacturing
    • Configuring SAP Digital Manufacturing for Execution: Basic Data and Configuration
    • Interest in basic programming topics

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to use bseg and for all entries in
entry.content: So, you'll have to use two SELECT: one for BKPF and BSIS, one for BSEG.

entry.content: You may use either abap2xlsx or XCO instead of CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA MM - Mapping between purchasing group to mat...
entry.content: Correct path is :SPRO --> MM --> Purchasing --> Purchase Requisition --> Define Mapping of Material Group to Purchasing group

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite_Service Contract screen IF error message
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

Service Contract information is linked to other peripheral systems using BTP Integration Suite.
When a Service Contract is created, BTP will be launched and data will be converted and integrated.

【Requirements】
When you press the "Save" button on the S/4HANA Cloud Service Contract, it is expected that IF integration will begin.
If an error occurs during IF integration, is it possible to display something like an error message on the Service Contract screen?

Soma

entry.content: Issue got resolved after updating the label name in odata service.

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello Artur,

The destination is required to point to your source SAP Cloud Integration instance, on your source subaccount, to define the source endpoint. You can also check out TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Con... - SAP Community (and especially the comments from Gauravi):

For your second question: you can use one cTMS instance to handle different environments - and you would then create a dedicated transport landscape for each CPI landscape (then pointing via the different destinations to the different end points running on different CPI tenants).

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: Text in Salesorder, Which Table does it get saved
entry.content: same issue, any solution?

entry.title: Re: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a...
entry.content:
I rarely use ST12 because I find the User Interface difficult to understand. I prefer using ST05 and SAT directly, depending on the context. If I remember well, some options of ST05 or SAT were not available in ST12. I use ST12 only if I have to start ST05 and SAT at the same time, but it happens rarely.

Many of my ABAP colleagues prefer using ST12, so I have asked them to look at your question.

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello Boris 

We have config 


And with this configuration, transport created and released from DEV NEW, in cTMS is visible as a created on DEV OLD.
I guess that responsible for this is the connection - CloudIntegration - correct me if I'm wrong. (docs https://help.sap.com/docs/content-agent-service/user-guide/create-sap-cloud-integration-destination?q=CloudIntegration)
Can we create CloudIntegration_OLD and CloudIntegration_NEW connections and force use depending on which CPI transport is created/released  by some additional parameters ?

Regards

Artur

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: Why write code when not necessary at all? The index approach will still handle the case when the source node does not exist by not producing target output, and it doesn't require maintaining any code directly. The goal should not be to write code but rather solve a problem, which in this case can be done with zero lines of code.

entry.title: Re: crystal report issue
entry.content:
When you use Windows Authentication you need to design and enable Trusted Authentication in the Report when connecting to the DB.

If it's not done this way then only option is to log in using SQL Server Authentication.

entry.title: Different number ranges for sales document type and billing document type.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In public cloud, We create sales order with (OR) Order type, as there is a requirement from customer for multiple sales order type copying OR order type which is not possible in public cloud system. so we have created one custom field Order sub type in that we have maintained multiple sales document type, so the user can select the Sub Order Type as required and can create a sales order, now the requirement is we want different number ranges for Order sub type and same should work for billing document.

Please suggest how can we achieve this scenario.

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: Ah yes, right, only required when a LB is used. Likely cause then is threading issue, you need to keep track of which thread/IIS Instance the report is using and make sure any requests go back to that IIS Process.

entry.title: Re: Retroacitve Billing in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: As per this SAP Help documentation, it is possible.  Of course, it is for price difference.

entry.title: Re: Create 2 bits from a cit but to different business pa...
entry.content:
Hello

First in order to create severals BITs, I suggest you to use allowances . By doing that, your main BIT is created by the charge on the main business partner and the allowance will create an additional BIT. 

Then in the allowance plan, you define the Output Item in order to redefine the value GPART and VKONT in order to reach another business partner than the initial one. You can use value from allowance parameters in order to redefine these field values. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
We have CAS and cTMS in one subbacount. Maybe the solution is to create two CAS, one per landscape?
Means crate CAS instance on each CPI DEV subbacount.

entry.title: Datasphere - Graphical vs SQL Views. Procs and Cons of each?
entry.content:
This is currently a debate between two developers, one a seasoned SQL developer and the other one who prefers graphical interfaces.

We both have similar arguments - transparency and ease of interpretation; speed; robustness

However you could argue for and against either based on all of the above.

Scouring the web on the topic (but not just related to Datasphere) some of the responses are:

Three reasons you would prefer the GUI:

  • The organisation that owns the dataset wants to protect the data infrastructure from poorly written SQL
  • Someone only asks rudimentary questions on small to medium sized data sets
  • Someone does not know how to write SQL and does not want to learn

Three reasons you would prefer using SQL:

  • SQL allows for more complex queries not easily achievable through the GUI, often with functions not available in the GUI Expression editor
  • Experienced developers can write SQL queries more quickly than navigating the GUI
  • Once written, a SQL query can be amended for another purpose, without starting from scratch

There are some interesting articles out there:

https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ELHonECz4Z0bgBle7Ld_v2gM8xZFPFKUmjYznKGkCFY/present?slide=id.p1

https://www.nextlytics.com/blog/sap-datasphere-sql-or-graphical-views-making-an-educated-decision

Graphical views may display the relationships between tables in terms of linkages, but you have to click on the joins to see the fields used. You also have to click on projections to see fields excluded, and functions to see transformations. A view with multiple tables, whilst on the surface presents a simplistic view, requires time to fully understand the ‘what’ and ‘how’ of what it is doing.

SQL views, when written applying good coding practices, present everything in one place – the sources, the joins (both the connections and the fields used), the conditions, any transformational logic and which fields are output and with what names/aliases. Including comments can also explained the 'Why' too

The argument that SQL queries can be overly complicated and difficult to interpret can be mitigated by splitting the code into sections, or even separate views. There is no necessity for monster scripts to be produced. Simpler layered views can be used for multiple purposes, GUI or SQL.

To focus purely on one as a corporate approach appears to be throwing the baby out with the bath water, when it should be horses for courses.

On a personal note I am that seasoned SQL developer, which may explain any unintentional bias herein. That said, I have a list of additional pros for SQL, one being:

  • One that recently came to light was rebuilding downstream views because a change was required to the initial view on the source table.
  • For SQL I copied the script, dropped the view, edited the high-level view, re-created the low-level view, pasted the script and made the necessary amendments. 2 minutes
  • For a graphical view, containing 5 tables, this takes much longer and the risk of missing something – a filter in a projection, a transformation in a function – is considerably higher.

I’d be interested to know your thoughts on the matter?

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: Hi Ryan, I do agree that this would work in my case. But in general I would still like to understand what I did wrong in my coding approach, to understand how it could be used in other cases in the future.

entry.title: Navigate in RAP via Button from root to subnode, not via standard arrow
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a RAP application with a root node and a subnode.  I would like to navigate from the list with all the records of the root nodes, via a button to the detail of the selected root node and the records of the corresponding subnode (so not via the standard arrow).
Is this possible in a simple way?
Is this possible with an ObjectPage?
Is there anyone who can help me with this?

Thx, Helga

entry.title: Re: SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Subscription with BYOD plan
entry.content:
Hello ShubhranshuP,

Please see answers for your questions below:

1. What are the additional Benefits of BYOD over the current 'PaPM Run-Time DB' ?

BYOD and PaPM Run-time DB still works in one code-line. Meaning, absolutely no difference when we are talking about its functionalities(Join, Calculation and so on...). But if the customer is using SAP HANA Cloud or SAP Datasphere as their strategic data platform then BYOD approach will provide additional benefits in terms of seamless integration as the data is already sitting with SAP PaPM Cloud.

The only thing need to perform is to provide the proper grants / authorization to use the data for complex calculation / data process in SAP PaPM Cloud.  For more information see: Administration Guide for SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud.

Under Additional Configuration > Database Administration, you will be seeing the scenarios that might be useful for grants.

2. Under a same tenant, can i have both 'PaPM Runtime DB' and 'BYOD' subscriptions?

No, this is not possible.

3. Is there is any migration path available, to move existing developments from  'PaPM Run-Time DB' to BYOD ?

As of this time of my comment, there is no lean migration paths yet from HANA Cloud​
Runtime Database (Default Plan) to Standalone Database (BYOD)​

entry.title: Re: Cancel goods issue as material has not reached the cu...
entry.content:
For cancelling Good issue and Invoice in SAP, you can perform a basic internet search and you will receive necessary details. 

In your case it seems the Good are lost in transit to the Customer. If you reverse the Goods issue they will be posted back to your PLant's stock and they have to be manually written off. 

Rather I would suggest to issue a Credit Note to Customer (if the Goods are list in transit and INvoice was already created). 

Thanks,

entry.title: FG Connector Library Documentation incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I was trying to report a documentation error but couldn't find a way, hence posting it here.

The documentation at the fieldglass connector library, specifically for the Cost Center Upload connector (Cost Center Upload | SAP Help Portal ) seems to be incorrect.

Under the section File Formatting -> Detail, the column names mention "Cost Center Code", "Cost Center Description" and so on but the connector is expecting "Cost Centre Code", "Cost Centre Description" and so on. Basically, the Center should be changed to Centre. Thank you

Regards,

mak42

entry.title: Re: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content: HI Kartik, I don't know of anything else. If UIBBs are not visible in the OVP which should be visible, then the root cause are either runtime changes that are done by the application or explicit or implicit personalization.

entry.title: Re: Sap Enable Now Launch Error - ZIP Error & FDIError
entry.content:
Thanks for the people who tried to assist me.  After trying every solution that has been previously been given and nothing worked, i deleted my wpb file, copied a colleague's wpb file uploaded it to my temp file and now it works.  Hope this assists some else who in the future also battles endlessly.

Regards

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Showing Blank
entry.content: Hi JCD, probably if you can share how you configured in your system please? I am struggling atm to find ways to configure this...

entry.title: Re: Different number ranges for sales document type and b...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Assigning different number range to sales documents based on custom logic not supported in S/4HANA Cloud. There is no corresponding BAdI to support this extension.

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Enhancement using Clean core approach usi...
entry.content: @Ila99, Check our this BAdI: SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_BUSINESS which will suffice your requirement.

entry.title: Re: How can I deploy my completed SAP Build Apps web appl...
entry.content:
Hi Arun,

I have deployed the SAP Build App using the SAP Build Service. It appears under HTML5 Applications, but it shows an "Internal Server Error" when I try to access it. Since the "Launch" option was not available in Build Apps, I selected Build and Deploy, then added the Create Configuration → SAP Build Work Zone option. After that, I clicked Build, and the deployment completed successfully, but the application still shows an error.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE 16 certification on Oracle Cloud
entry.content:
SAPNote 2922454 is maintained as an entry point for hyperscaler deployments of ASE.  It has links to SAPNotes detailing O/S requirements for ASE 16.0 SP03, SP04 and ASE 16.1 SP00.

Chris

entry.title: Re: SAP b1 analytics powered by SAP HANA is not installed...
entry.content:
Steps to Execute:

  1. Run the following command on the full instance:
    ALTER DATABASE NDB ADD 'scriptserver'

  2. After executing the command, open the Control Center (SLD), go to Services, and click on the link Enablement.

  3. Click on the Company icon. You will see your database listed there.
    Select your database and click the Initialize icon.
    Wait until the initialization process is complete.

  4. Once completed, re-login to SAP and check your dashboard — it should now be accessible.

Note:
If the dashboard does not open, please restart the following services:

  • Service Layer

  • Web Client

  • SAP Business One Server Tools Service 

Then, reopen SAP and check again.

Thanks

Himanshu Yadav

entry.title: Re: How to automate a warehouse task creation
entry.content: Hi Ajit, it is a bin to bin for HU

entry.title: Enable Background Elements in SAP Onboarding 2.0 (Enhancement ID: 344613)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I’d like to bring attention to a significant enhancement request that impacts many SAP SuccessFactors customers across industries and geographies.

Current Limitation:

As of today, Background Elements such as:

  • Education
  • Work Experience
  • Certifications
  • Languages, etc.

are not supported in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0. This limitation means such critical data cannot be captured during the onboarding process and does not flow automatically into Employee Central post-hire.

Why This Matters:

This gap creates operational inefficiencies and potential compliance risks. Without Background Elements support in Onboarding:

  • HR teams must manually collect and re-enter data into EC
  • Employees often have to duplicate data entry post-hire
  • Incomplete profiles hinder downstream processes like Learning, Talent, and Analytics
  • Organizations face challenges in maintaining data integrity and audit readiness

Proposed Enhancement (ID: 344613):

The enhancement proposes that SAP:

1.Enable support for Background Elements in the Onboarding 2.0 process

2.Allow seamless integration of that data into Employee Central upon hire

This would ensure a complete and accurate employee profile from Day 1, streamline data flow, and reduce manual intervention.

Who Benefits:

  • HR Professionals: Reduce manual workload, ensure data consistency
  • New Hires: Smoother onboarding experience
  • Compliance Teams: Audit-ready certification and education records
  • Managers: Better decision-making with enriched employee data
  • All SAP Customers: More scalable and standardized onboarding-to-hire process

How You Can Help:

Please take a moment to support this enhancement request on the SAP Customer Influence Portal:

Vote here → https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/344613/?section=sectionDetails

Your vote and comments can make a difference in helping SAP prioritize this enhancement that can benefit the entire SuccessFactors ecosystem.

Let’s collaborate and help shape the future of SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding.

entry.title: Re: You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask to grant you the InA role.
entry.content: I Have the same issue , have you addressed the final solution? (Connecting between SAC AND S/4 HANA CLOUD , Public Edition.)

entry.title: Miss Material Group Fields in Service Consumer: CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out in CDP integ.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

 

We are currently using the service consumer CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out to integrate with SAP CDP. During the integration process, we encountered an issue where the Material Group fields (MVGR1, MVGR2, MVGR3, MVGR4, MVGR5) are not present in the WSDL definition of this service.

 

These fields are crucial for our integration scenario and are already available in another standard service consumer, SalesOrderBulkReplication_Out. We require similar access to the material group fields in the CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out service.

 

Could you please advise how we can enhance or configure the service to include these fields? Alternatively, is there a recommended approach or extension method to make these fields available?

 

We appreciate your guidance on resolving this issue.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Sensitive compensation data RBP subjected not hidden during the hiring approval wf
entry.content:
@aspiripillo Your requirement is, You created a custom field in "Job info" and "comp info" Which is subjective to be hidden. During a New hire, When the workflow is triggered then the hiring manager can see that sensitive information even though the hiring manager doesn't have RBP permission to view that field.

If I understood your requirement correctly, then you should change the setting in the workflow, set the respective step column "Respect permission" to "Yes".

entry.title: Call a "Non-Remote-Enabled" Function Module in RAP Action
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently trying to call a Function Module within a RAP Action:

FP_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME

I came across a topic that was already covered in multiple questions. Below are a few other posts for reference:

  • Calling BAPI in RAP Action - managed scenario - BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
  • RAP Managed - Action with BAPI
  • Cannot execute a BAPI inside SAVE_MODIFIED method

However, none of the proposed solutions can be applied in my case for the following reasons:

  1. It is not possible to call the FM with DESTINATION ‘NONE’ because the FM is not “Remote-Enabled”
  2. Calling the FMas part of the Save-Sequence, within the save_modified method, is not possible because my action uses import parameters that are no longer accessible here

Note: I am working in S/4 HANA On-Premise - Release 2023

The only option I see is to capsulate the FB in a new FB to enable the call in a separate LUW.

Are there any alternative approaches or does it make more sense to look for a comparable class or "new" / "released" functionality?

Thanks in advance for any feedback! 🙌

Best regards,
Lukas

entry.title: Business event for MCP
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please let me know the business event for remediation plan for MCP

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: How to assign SAP user (not BTP email) in Approval Step in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m building a workflow in SAP Build Process Automation, and I need to assign an SAP backend user to the Approval Request step.

I don’t want to assign the task using a BTP user email — I want to use the SAP user (e.g., from S/4HANA) instead.

Is it possible to assign approval tasks based on SAP usernames or user IDs?
If so:

  • How should the user be referenced in the process?

  • Do I need to configure anything in Identity Authentication or Cloud Connector to make this work?

Any help or clarification would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: EWM - Auto create Warehouse Task from Inbound & Outbound
entry.content:
Hi,

 thanks you for this Blog. I have a question for you, You explain how to create a task automatically based on an inbound delivery or an outbound delivery.

Is it possible to create a task automatically after a bin to bin ? I explain my problem, i need to move an HU accross multiple storage type and i want to automate the most i can. I need to create manually a bin to bin form the Storage type 1 to the storage type 2 and i want, when i confirmed it, that the sytem create a new bin to bin to a storage type 3. Do you think it is possible?

Thanks per advance for your response.

entry.title: Your job cannot be distributed because there is no agent that matches this SDK version
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am getting the error 'Your job cannot be distributed because there is no agent that matches this SDK version' while executing a BPA based workflow.

From error description, it is clear that, this is due to agent version mismatch and as a result the Workflow cannot proceed further.

For the similar issue, there is a already community post here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-your-job-cannot-be-distributed-because-there-is-no-agent-defined/qaq-p/12675847 and also there is a SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3191086.

The actual problem here is, the agent download link mentioned in the above NOTE re-directs to the download page with obsolete versions, which I have already installed and they are not working, because the project is expecting agent with version above 3.13.

It is disabled to change the project version to lower version in build project agent version settings.

Where can we download the latest version of the agents ? or is there a way to change agent ersion settings in SAP Build project ?

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: ISD-Input service distributor for distributing GST to multiple business places - In S4 Hana
entry.content:
To resolve the error of profit center please implement the SAP note 2877752 - GST IN: Business area and Profit center error in J1IG_ISDN. SAP has suggested for Z implementation of BADI 'J_1IG_BADI_ISD' and fill the Business area/Profit Center in method 'FILL_BAPI_EXTENSION'.

Thanks

Sunil Patil

entry.title: Re: Call a "Non-Remote-Enabled" BAPI in RAP Action
entry.content:
• First, if the FM is not RFC-compliant, it's not a BAPI (and that's not enough)
    'In the SAP system, BAPIs are stored as RFC-capable function modules in the ABAP Workbench Function Builder.'
  • You can then create an RFC FM to wrap these FMs. (Is the FM released)

entry.title: Re: Sensitive compensation data RBP subjected not hidden during the hiring approval wf
entry.content: Hi, yes you absoluely got the need, but unfortunately we have the setting you suggest in workflow, but anyhow the permission are ignored.

entry.title: Only Active records when using Termination
entry.content:
Hello @YSE-1 

I searched in the forum, but couldn't find a solution for my problem. 

I saw that a lot of people have the same problem, which is, when trying to view Terminations, all records are being shown as Active, yet in the system we have Terminated employees. The thing is, it's not about termination day, as a lot of employees have been terminated a few months ago. I saw something similar that I would like to try, but I'm not proficient in SQL.

Here Solved: Termination metric not capturing data - SAP Community What is the exact code that I would have to type in this measure? I tried deleting the EXC expression, but when I click validate then ok, nothing happens, when I open it again, it's the same expression. Nothing has changed. It even says with red "Measure saved successfully" yet the changes are not saved. 

I attached a screenshot from the system which shows that when selecting terminations and analyzing by Employment Status, they all show as Active. The Employment Statuses are correctly put in the system(at least, I think so, will upload a screenshot from Edit Hierarchies). I went to Drill to Detail and checked multiple Person IDs and they were terminated a few month ago, so I don't think the problem would be the -1 day logic.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Practice systems unavailable?
entry.content:
Hi @Olivier_Mountap 
Please check the What is a system time frame? FAQ.
You can also create a case to get an update related to the availability of the system.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to automate a warehouse task creation
entry.content:
Hi @Remy3 ,

You can do it with layout oriented storage control (LOSC)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/566c443c4b7a4ae2b2051443633c7b6d.html?locale=en-US&q=LayOut+Oriented

Blogs: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/layout-oriented-storage-control-losc-in-simple-inbound-process/ba-p/13935830

I think my asumption settings be 

Create WT from Source Storage Type SRAC to destination SType CRAC so system will create WT/WO automatically as per your example.

Please explore bit more about HU Gr/ WPT...other parameters before and let us know if any questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Call a "Non-Remote-Enabled" BAPI in RAP Action
entry.content: Thanks for the feedback. I updated the post accordingly and will now try to wrap the FM.

entry.title: Re: Different number ranges for sales document type and b...
entry.content: Read first this blog S/4HANA Q2C Sales Flexibility - Determine Number Range for Sales Document.

entry.title: Re: How can I deploy my completed SAP Build Apps web appl...
entry.content: Look for failed network calls, CORS errors, or 404/500 from services

entry.title: Re: SAC: Story filter not working when set to single sele...
entry.content:
Dear @BeatrizDuenas,

I faced a similar issue in the past were # - unassigned was the only booked member of my dimension and for single selection filters, at least one booked member must be available, otherwise the single selection filter won't be able to render.

You can easily test by selecting the # - unassigned and see if the issue still persists.

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: How can I deploy my completed SAP Build Apps web appl...
entry.content: Also hope the destinations are maintained properly->check connection(success)

entry.title: Re: Missing steps in "Create and Edit the Automation" Tut...
entry.content: Thanks Rohit 🙂

entry.title: Re: Navigate in RAP via Button from root to subnode, not...
entry.content:
If you are referring this navigation in UI then yes , you can Object page in order to show the details of the subnode (Child)  . 

Check this 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-creating-an-sap-fiori-elements-app-based-on-an-odata-v4-rap-service

entry.title: Re: Report S_PL0_86000030 showing incorrect values
entry.content:
• Did you get similar result with FAGLB03?
  • What did you already look for?
  • Execute a SQL and Abap trace, which tables were read and was some custome Enhencement executed

entry.title: Re: On Premise / Private Cloud Fiori Launchpad - News in New My Home
entry.content: Hi rb, Thanks @ThomasReiss for notifying me about this query. This blog provides information on the news feed https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/system-news-customizing-the-my-home-news-feed/ba-p/13579801. You can configure the visibility and the source of the news feed. The news feed can be set up to display 1. SAP System News (via excel) or 2. An RSS feed (url). The news tile is displayed only if the news URL is from the same domain. Thanks, Caroline

entry.title: Re: U: Error or Bug in Analytics Cloud Live Model Paramet...
entry.content:
We have:
BI_CONT        757 0034 SAPK-75734INBICONT     Business Intelligence Content
BI_CONT_XT 757 0034 SAPK-75734INBICONTXT Business Intelligence Content for Bobj I

We added to RSADMIN:
RSMD_ALLOW_SELOPT_OR_FOR1 LESEKLASSEA
RSMD_ALLOW_SELOPT_OR_FOR2 MERKMALB

Than, as a precaustion measure, delete the OLAP Cache:
RSRCACHE - OLAP: Cache Monitor

Restarted AfO and SAC:
... and it worked out

It might be that deleteing the OLAP Cache only could also work out

Thank You
Best Martin

entry.title: How to Exclude Reservation from MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m trying to find a way to exclude specific reservations from appearing in MD04.

The use case is based on a condition in the reservation (when RESB-XWAOK is initial). In such cases, we want to prevent the reservation from being considered in MRP and ideally have it not show up in MD04 at all.

While researching possible enhancements, I came across the BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA.

My question is: Is it possible to use MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA to exclude reservation entries from MD04? If so, what’s the recommended approach? If not, is there another BAdI or enhancement point that would be more suitable for this requirement?

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Complex selection not supported for filter search function
entry.content:
Kindly check also the Question, Solution and Comments in

U: Error or Bug in Analytics Cloud Live Model Parameter F4 Help for ID or description search

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Complex selection not supported for filter search function
entry.content: NONE

entry.title: Enter incoming invoice RPA
entry.content:
Dear all,   

we are implementing process Enter Incoming Invoice (PDF) - ECC (MIRO) (https://api.sap.com/package/3f1e226f28d84f309e7b0cf07579e5bd/overview), 

but unfortunately this error occurs when the agent is looking for the email containing the invoice (pls see the attached image).

Can someone help us?

Thank you.

Elena

entry.title: AI or Machine Learning Implementation on SAP Credit management in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

I wanted to get an overview / understanding /Process around implementing Credit management in SAP S/4 PERSON_NAME by utilizing AI or Machine Learning on predictive analysis and what processes can be automated in SAP FSCM _ Credit management.

 

 

best regards

Srivalli


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: AI or Machine Learning Implementation on SAP Credit m...
entry.content: The Predictive Capabilities in SAP Credit Management can be found in the SAP Help Portal Predictive Capabilities in SAP Credit Management

entry.title: Integrating SHL for assessments, but use SAP AI features for SHL skills at a later time?
entry.content:
Hello!

 

I'm integrating SHL for assessments with our RCM recruiting module and may add skills in the future. Can we use SAP AI-assisted features for SHL skills?

Thanks,

Kelly Conklin

entry.title: Re: Hey, I'm new here ^^
entry.content:
Thank you so much. I am very excited to be part of SAP community. 

I will definitely check it out. Thank you again.

entry.title: Re: Project System
entry.content:
A great place to start learning SAP PS is here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4dd8cb7b1c484b4b93af84d00f60fdb8/1ad4b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html

Revenue Recognition is called Results Analysis, it is part of PS but also in many other areas of SAP.

PS projects can be made up of WBS Elements and/or Networks, look in the help for more details.

PS links to Materials Management several different ways.  Look in SAP help for more details.

entry.title: Re: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a...
entry.content: Hi holm, i see your point. I just returned to the classical ABAP world and work on HANA and CDS topics, so not much experience on the topics you mentioned. How do you approach these topics today? What tools are you using? Kind regards, Hermann

entry.title: Native HANA / XSA CDS - annotation for 'measure'
entry.content:
Hi experts,

   working on a HANA 1.0 (1.120) on premise Database and looking into what we can achieve directly on the DB for applications not running an ABAP layer.

Is it possible to define a column for a Native HANA CDS as a Measure, allowing the OData service to effectively request a dynamic "group by" based on the columns (Dimensions) requested in the query?

Example:

TestCDS.hdbdd file that does not define the Measure;

namespace IHA.models.MII.TAB_VIEWS.TD.services;
@SCHEMA: 'SAPD33'
context TestCDS {
view TestCDS as select from RESB
{
RSNUM,
RSPOS,
AUFNR,
MATNR,
BDMNG
};
};

 

Ideally I want to define BDMNG as a measure, however replacing this with @DefaultAggregation: #SUM BDMNG just results in an error when saving via the HANA Web IDE

 

The OData service is defined as;

service namespace "pp.mii.resb" {
"IHA.models.MII.TAB_VIEWS.TD.services::TestCDS.TestCDS"
as "reservationdata" keys generate local "ID"
;
}
annotations {
enable OData4SAP;
}

 

I read that it may also be possible to define the expression within the OData service (https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#expression-annotations) but I cannot see how to achieve this within my OData defintion.

 

Am I attempting something only possible in an ABAP CDS/OData service or is this possible directly at DB level?

entry.title: SAP MDK Web - Debug Sources
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I developed an SAP MDK web application that I would now like to debug the local deployment. While the debug sources for my own code are available in the developer console, I would also like to access the debug sources of the MDK web runtime. This would help me better understand the runtime itself and the interaction between the runtime and my application code

Is there a way to enable the debug sources of the SAP MDK Web Runtime?

Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content:
Hi Sandra_Rossi,

I implemented an enhancement to retrieve my data in the end of CU50. (LCKDIO33 in the end of PERFOM fill_costgrid_table ).

All data that I need are, in the enhancement, insert into a Z table.

But the SHDB does not allow me to make the calculation of the CU50 and therefore does not allow me to go through my enhancement and therefore does not record any entry in my Z table.

I tried to play with all options of the SHDB -> without success

Can you please help me. 
Thanks in advance

entry.title: Sales Order Invoice Request is with status Inconsistent and corresponding Invoice not processed
entry.content:
Sales Order Invoice Request is with status Inconsistent and due to that the Outbound Delivery Invoice Request cannot be processed. 

When click on Check button, system shows the error "Financial data for seller missing in master data of account"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Invoice Request is with status Inconsiste...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

When the Invoice Request was created the customer account did not have the company maintained in the Financial Data tab, due to that the issue is displayed. 

To resolve the issue kindly follow the KBA 1822783 - Inconsistent Invoice Request is Created With Error Message: "Financial data for seller missing in master data of account"

 

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: How to automate creation of Inbound delivery, GR, WT/WO for Putaway - public edition EWM
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

currently we are looking for automatic Warehouse processes for SAP EWM, which incl. automatically creation of inbound delivery goods receipt, warehouse tasks/orders for putaway, because we're preparing to combine processes with warehouse operator app, without doing above mentioned steps manually as before.  

As much as we know the current release Warehouse operator App 2.4 could only create HU WT/WO but not product WT/WO.

SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.4 - What's new? - SAP Community

Kindly adivce, thanks in advacne.

regards,

Xiawei

entry.title: Sap Convergent Invoicing Process
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to carry out the following task in Convergent Invoicing:

Insert a zeroing line in the invoice, after the invoice has been calculated including VAT. I need the following information:

- Where to position myself within Convergent Invoicing in order to have the completed invoice including VAT. 

- Which standard functionality in Convergent Invoicing to call in order to write to DFKKOP and DFKKOPK, to insert the new zeroing invoice line and its posting

Example:
Total amount in Convergent Invoicing: €0.02

New line added via custom event: -€0.02
= Updated total amount: €0.00

Thank you
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Different number ranges for sales document type and b...
entry.content:
Hi @AshishTumpally ,

please check the functionality Flexible Sales Document Numbering in S/4Hana Cloud. This functionality also supports custom fields in the sales document header, which is the case in your scenario. 

Best regards

entry.title: Embed a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) story into a SharePoint
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're trying to embed a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) story into a SharePoint site using the Embed web part. Both SharePoint and SAC use SAML-based Single Sign-On (SSO) via Azure AD, and user authentication works as expected.

Here's the embed code we're using:

<iframesrc="https: //XXXXXXXX.euXX.hcs.cloud.sap/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/XXXXXXX/bo/embed/story/XXXXXXXXXX" width="100%" height="600"></iframe>

What we've already done:

  • In SharePoint:
    Under Site Settings > HTML Field Security, we've added the domain:
    XXXXXXXX.euXX.hcs.cloud.sap
  • In Azure AD:
    SAP Analytics Cloud has been added as an enterprise application.
  • In SAC (under System > Administration > App Integration):
    We've added the following trusted domains:
    • https: //XXXXXXX.sharepoint.com
    • https://*.sharepoint.com

      Problem:

      When we try to view the embed web part in SharePoint, we get an error inside the iFrame. We’ve attached a screenshot of the error below for reference.

      Question:

      Has anyone successfully embedded a SAC story in SharePoint this way?

      Are there any additional configurations needed in SAC (e.g. headers, CSP, embedding permissions) or SharePoint (web part limitations, CSP settings, etc.)?

      Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

      Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Insert Link feature stopped working in SEN
entry.content: SAP will apply a hotfix to Cloud SEN during the weekend of April 12. The hotfix file will be available for On-Premise customers in https://me.sap.com.

entry.title: Re: Issue with OData Requests in Analytical Models Follow...
entry.content: We've had the same problem since the weekend.

entry.title: Re: Open Items Display in FBL1N but F-44 is not taking th...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to SAP note: 1709866

In the note it says:

There can be 4 possibles raisons:

a) Check if the clearing date on the initial screen of F-44/F-32 is equal to or later than the posting date of the items.

b) Check if the items have a special GL indicator on them, and if so, deselect the "Normal OI" flag on the initial screen of F-44/F-32.

c) Check that the items are not included in a payment proposal that has not yet been paid. You can check in table REGUH  to see if these items are in there. If so, then you should either complete the payment step in F110 or else delete the proposal via F110 to "free up" these items for manual clearing.

You can check REGUP with doc number to find which Proposal contain the GL doc number

d) Check if document Central Finance (CFIN) is used but not the CFIN function Central Payment.

 

Hope it'll help.

entry.title: Re: EC Time - Tipps and hints Nr. 5: how to accrual vacation time accounts based on EC time sheet da
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof, 

Thanks for the in-depth guide on this subject. What if we wanted to achieve something like this, but only considering attendance times during calendar OFF days, for example: for every hour worked in an OFF day, 30 minutes of vacation are added. What would be the correct approach to creating this? Tried some different configurations, but couldn't achieve it.

Thanks in advance,

Luís

entry.title: Re: Not able to update the values in S4Hana public with PUT method
entry.content: s

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE HADR - database replication limit
entry.content: I usually setup clients with master database replication if simply to insure logins, passwords and login roles are kept in sync with the remote system; this assumes the target dataserver's replicate databases are coming from the same source dataserver (ie, the source and target dataservers are managing the same set of logins).

entry.title: How Does the Integration of SAP S/4HANA Modules Enhance Operational Efficiency for Businesses?
entry.content:
How does the integration of the finance, supply chain, and production planning modules in the SAP S/4HANA platform optimize data flow and decision-making processes? What are the advantages provided by this integration?

https://www.researchgate.net/spotlight/67f7c456fd4a6077420b6bfa

entry.title: Re: How can I assign operation from one resource to two or three resources using the “SAP_MULT_SCH”?
entry.content: Hi! I´m in the same situation, do you have any solution? Thank you!
